sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78694" key="para/rrhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρά-ρρησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n78694.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">incorrect expression</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.994d</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
